cards.back: Water stored beneath the Earth's surface in permeable rock and soil
Water that flows across national boundaries

cards.front: What is the importance of Access to Clean Drinking Water
cards.back: It is essential for human health, hygiene, and overall well-being

cards.front: What are the main Factors Affecting Water Quality
cards.back: Pollution, Climate Change, Human Activities, and Natural Disasters

cards.front: What is the Global Water Crisis
cards.back: A situation where the availability of freshwater resources is insufficient to meet the demands of the global population
